Description: Anchor links should scroll smoothly to target section
Do: Use scroll-behavior: smooth on html element
Don't: Jump directly without transition

Description: Fixed nav should not obscure content
Do: Add padding-top to body equal to nav height
Don't: Let nav overlap first section content

Description: Current page/section should be visually indicated
Do: Highlight active nav item with color/underline
Don't: No visual feedback on current location

Description: Users expect back to work predictably
Do: Preserve navigation history properly
Don't: Break browser/app back button behavior

Description: URLs should reflect current state for sharing
Do: Update URL on state/view changes
Don't: Static URLs for dynamic content

Description: Too many animations cause distraction and motion sickness
Do: Animate 1-2 key elements per view maximum
Don't: Animate everything that moves

Description: Animations should feel responsive not sluggish
Do: Use 150-300ms for micro-interactions
Don't: Use animations longer than 500ms for UI

Description: Respect user's motion preferences
Do: Check prefers-reduced-motion media query
Don't: Ignore accessibility motion settings

Description: Layout shift when content loads is jarring
Do: Reserve space for async content (aspect-ratio)
Don't: Let images/content push layout around

Description: Small buttons are hard to tap accurately
Do: Minimum 44x44px touch targets (standard)
Don't: Tiny clickable areas

Description: AI outputs can be factually incorrect
Do: Include permanent or dismissible disclaimer for AI content
Don't: Present AI claims as absolute truth
Code Example Good: generated by AI for info only

Description: Users need feedback while AI processes complex tasks
Do: Show 'Thinking' pulse or animated skeleton
Don't: Show generic loading spinner or frozen UI

Description: Large text blocks should appear gradually (streaming)
Do: Stream text token by token to reduce perceived latency
Don't: Show long wait then dump all text at once

Description: AI needs feedback to improve
Do: Provide thumbs up/down or 'Regenerate' option
Don't: Read-only text with no way to improve

Description: AI voice should match brand personality
Do: Set system prompts for consistent tone
Don't: Random/Generic AI responses

Description: Heavy assets increase carbon footprint
Do: Use WebP/AVIF and compress 3D models (Draco)
Don't: Serve full-size PNG/RAW assets

Description: Video loops consume massive energy and data
Do: Disable auto-play or use low-res mute loops
Don't: Force 4K auto-playing background video

Description: Dark pixels save energy on OLED screens
Do: Provide true black (#000) dark mode option
Don't: Dark grey only (#333)

Description: Physical feedback improves tap confidence
Do: Add subtle vibration on success/error/toggle
Don't: Vibrate on every scroll or long text

Description: Celebrate user achievement sparingly
Do: Show confetti on checkout/signup completion
Don't: Show confetti on every button click

Description: Grid cells must re-order logically on small screens
Do: Use grid-auto-flow or manual order for hierarchy
Don't: Let grid break randomly on mobile

Description: Modern designs often use low-contrast text
Do: Maintain 4.5:1 (AA) or 7:1 (AAA) strictly
Don't: Use light grey on white for 'aesthetic'

Description: Don't ask for location/media immediately
Do: Request permissions only when functionally needed
Don't: Ask for everything on page load

Description: Eyes track before hands touch
Do: Add hover effects to gaze focus targets
Don't: Static elements until physical tap

Description: Flash of unstyled text (FOUT) is jarring
Do: Use font-display: swap with similar metrics fallback
Don't: Wait for font to finish loading before paint
